title: Meet the Nuclear Missile Guard Abducted by Aliens
summary: Richard Barth, a former Air Force security guard at Vandenberg Air Force Base, recounts his September 1964 encounter with non-human beings while guarding a Minuteman missile site. He describes being paralyzed by a humanoid figure, taken aboard a craft, and receiving telepathic communication that the beings were conducting reconnaissance on nuclear missiles to prevent nuclear war.

acronyms.definition: A long-range missile capable of delivering nuclear warheads across continents
Security alarm system on the fence around missile sites
Unidentified objects observed underwater, similar to UFOs but in aquatic environments
Modern terminology for UFOs used by government and military

events.description: Richard Barth's close encounter with non-human beings at Vandenberg Air Force Base while guarding a Minuteman missile site in September
Bob Jacobs filmed a UFO shooting beams at an Atlas missile dummy warhead at Vandenberg Air Force Base in September
Robert Salas experienced UFO incident at Malmstrom Air Force Base where 10 missiles went offline at Oscar Flight
F8 Atlas missile tracked by a 'tagalong' UFO, documented in reports before Bluegill Triple Prime test

key_claims.claim: A humanoid figure in a trench coat approached Richard Barth at a Minuteman missile site, paralyzed his right arm, and prevented him from drawing his weapon or screaming
Barth was taken aboard a circular craft where he observed four baby-headed beings with large eyes sitting on benches
The beings communicated telepathically that they needed access to missile data and would not allow nuclear war to occur
The beings indicated there are multiple non-human species and not all are as benevolent as they are
Bob Jacobs filmed a UFO that fired beams of light at a dummy warhead, causing it to tumble out of frame
The government denied Bob Jacobs ever existed in the Air Force, at Vandenberg, or in the photographic unit he commanded
Ten missiles went offline simultaneously at Malmstrom Air Force Base during the Oscar Flight incident while a red glowing object hovered above
Between 2003 and 2005, five UAP incidents occurred at Vandenberg Air Force Base
Barth witnessed a yellow orb tracking an Atlas missile launch in May 1964 and was told by a sergeant to keep quiet about it
